helpmenuitem.name: MTI Macro Modelling with CGE models
GGIG (Gams Graphical User Interface Generator) web page

control.title: Zip file with GTAP Base Data
Zip file with GTAP AEZ Data
Input
control.tasks: Prepare GTAP SAM,Match to macro SAM

control.title: Region(s)
control.tooltip: Leave empty to generate SAMs for all GTAP regions.

control.title: New SAM account electrified other transport
Domestic debt stock relative to gov consumption
New debt stock relative to gov consumption
Write new SAM to bridge file
Choose the Bridge file to write
control.dependsOnAll: Write new SAM to bridge file:true/Region input dir
control.tooltip: Selects the xlsx to write the SAM.

control.title: Cutoff value for small SAM cells 1.E
Lower bound for make matrix entries
Upper bound for make matrix entries
Lower bound for indirect firm taxes
Upper bound for indirect firm taxes
Lower bound for indirect product taxes
Upper bound for indirect product taxes
Region dir
control.tooltip: Project directory, first three characters define name of GTAP regions

control.title: SAM input (xlsx)
control.tooltip: Selects the xlsx comprising the SAM, sets and macro-data.

control.title: BAU file (gdx)
control.tooltip: Selects the GDX files with the baseline results.

control.title: Use results as baseline
control.tooltip: Simulation results define a baseline

control.title: Last year
control.tooltip: Last year for which data are avaiable and maximum end year of simulation

control.title: Last year of simulation
control.tooltip: Allows to end the simulation before the last year for which data are available.

control.title: Stochastic runs
control.tooltip: Number of runs with MANAGE

control.title: Stochastic draws to summarize
control.tooltip: Monte Carlo draws for each MANAGE run

control.title: Simulation name
control.tooltip: Overwrites the default of using the name of shock file to label the result file.

control.title: Postfix
control.tooltip: Appends an additional text to the name of the shock file

control.title: Scen driver 1
control.tooltip: Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5

control.title: Scen driver 2
control.tooltip: Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5

control.title: Scen driver 3
control.tooltip: Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5

control.title: Scen driver 4
control.tooltip: Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5

control.title: Scen driver 5
control.tooltip: Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5

control.title: Scen driver 6
control.tooltip: Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5
Allows to define text passed to GAMS, such as $setglobal myChange 0.5

control.title: Climate change damagages
control.tooltip: Define selected CC damage shocks based on Roson and Sartori

control.title: Invest link
control.tooltip: Pass land cover change to SEALS/INVEST and pass shocks from INVEST to MANAGE in each year

control.title: Air Pollution damages
control.tooltip: Air pollution damages to labor productivity, labor type and activity specific

control.title: Fiscal Responsibility
control.tooltip: Reduce gov consumption and savings and increase taxes if debt to GDP ceiling is reached

control.title: Debt/GDP Target (%), up
control.tooltip: Target for maximal debt to GDP ratio for fiscal responsibility. For 25% enter 25. Set to zero to use data from bridge file.

control.title: Debt/GDP Target (%), low
control.tooltip: Target for minimal debt to GDP ratio for fiscal responsibility. For 25% enter 25. Set to zero to disable

control.title: Expenditure delta relative to tax delta (%)
control.tooltip: How much expenditures decrease relatve to tax revenues increase. For 25% enter 25. Default is 100%

control.title: Short run shocks
control.tooltip: Run model in each year twice, the second time with lower factor suppyl elasticities, elastiticies change factor utilization rates

control.title: GDP (composition) scenario
control.tooltip: Name of scenario for GDP scenarios as stored in bridge-file

control.title: Balanced growth check
control.tooltip: Changes saving rates and demand elasticities to run a balanaced growth check with 1% population increases

control.title: Benchmark check
control.tooltip: Copies benchmark values to t+1 and runs the model with zero iterations to check benchmarking

control.title: Skip GTAP emission calculations
control.tooltip: Skips calculation of GTAP emissions and prevents loading land cover data from GTAP for debugging.

control.title: Forward looking
control.tooltip: The model is solved with a rolling time window of multiple years to consider price expectations, introduces stock dynamics

control.title: Weight decrease
control.tooltip: Yearly decrease in weight of future years in defining expectations

control.title: Labor vintages
control.tooltip: Differentiation of sluggishness in labor supply between new entrants and old stock

control.title: Sticky wage
control.tooltip: A value of zero switches the mechanism off

control.title: Vintages
control.tooltip: Activities broken in new vintage working with new captial and old vintages using old capital stock. Substitution elasticities in the production function can differ.

control.title: Update share parameters
control.tooltip: Share parameters of old vintage in t reflect a weighted average of old and new vintage cost shares in t-1

control.title: Current Account
control.options: Fixed as nominal GDP share"Foreign saving fixed relative to nominal GDP" Endogenous with exchange rate and GDP price index fixed"Both GDP price index and exchange rate are fixed" Endogenous driven by expected return to capital and debt to GDP"as in GTEM" Endogenous driven by expected return"Global bank approach from GTAP Standard model" Endogenous driven by investments not covered by regional savings

control.title: Transfers from ROW
control.options: Driven by population growth Driven by GDP growth
control.tooltip: Defines update mechanism for transfer from ROW to domestic institutions

control.title: Sector specific investments
control.tooltip: Investment demand composition is sector specific such that composition of economy-wide demand changes with sector comsposition

control.title: Share of old capital in investment demand
control.tooltip: ![CDATA[A share of old capital defines besides new capital the weighted in defining the average composition of investment demand]]

control.title: Income dependent CDE parameters
control.tooltip:
Parameters of CDE demand functions for households are updated depending on income per capita.
Regression results using GTAP parameters in cross-sectional analysis for some broader groups can be found in GTAP
template bridge files.

control.title: Capital income shares depend on saving
control.tooltip:
Allocation of factor income of capital is updated according to changes in savings of the different
institutions (households, government, enterprises.

control.title: Differentiated labor productivity
control.tooltip: Empiricallly estimated function by Roson updates labor productivity in primary and secondary sectors</br> relative to service sectors, driven by GDP growth.

control.title: Land productivity follows labor
control.tooltip: Land productivity in primary sectors is coupled with factor to changes in labor productivity

control.title: Natural ressource productivity follows labor
control.tooltip: Natural ressource productivity in primary sectors is coupled with factor to changes in labor productivity

control.title: Capital productivity follows labor
control.tooltip: Capital productivity in sectors is coupled with factor to changes in labor productivity

control.title: Temperature delta base year for Roson and Sartori
Temperature delta last simulation year for Roson and Sartori
Roson and Sartori for labor productivity
Roson and Sartori for land stock
Roson and Sartori for energy demand
Roson and Sartori for crop yields
GHG Mitigation
control.tooltip: Add options for carbon taxation

control.title: Additional shock File (inc)
control.tooltip: Shock file to run besides CCDR.inc

control.title: Policy instrument
control.options: Carbon tax,Ceiling to benchmark,Ceiling to baseline,Absolute ceiling

control.title: MACCs
control.tooltip:
Use mechanism which reduces process emission factors depending on points on
Marginal Abatement Cost Curves entered in bridge file and current level of carbon tax.

control.title: Direct tax recyling
control.tooltip: Share of carbon taxes recycled to reduce direct taxes.

control.title: Factor tax recyling
control.tooltip: Share of carbon taxes recycled to reduce factor taxes.

control.title: Sales tax recyling
control.tooltip: Share of carbon taxes recycled to reduce sales taxes.

control.title: All tax recyling
control.tooltip: Share of carbon taxes recycled to reduce all taxes.

control.title: Transfers recyling
control.tooltip: Share of carbon taxes recycled as transfers to domestic institutions.

control.title: IEC climate
control.options: Wet/Warm mean,Hot/Dry mean,Dry/Hot mean,SSP1-1.9 mean,SSP3-7.0 mean

control.Title: Number of experiments
control.tooltip: Number of MANAGE runs with stochastically drawn parameters based on LHS.

control.Title: Start number
control.tooltip:
Indicator number for block of stochastic draws. Draws will be consectuively numbers
such that results from multiple blocks can be combined (this requires however a separate GAMS process.

control.Title: Pairing
control.tooltip:
Restricted will change order of draws for different factors to minimze co-variances between
draws for the factors. Requires more computing time.

control.title: Only generate draws
control.tooltip: Program will stop after LHS has run and draws are reported to lising file.

control.title: Output for reporting back-end
control.tooltip: Required to view results in pre-defined tables, graphs and maps.

control.title: Reduced output for back-end
control.tooltip:
Remove some detail (such as producitivity shifters, or on demand bundles) from reporting to save disk space
and memory needs with inspecting results for many runs.

control.title: Generate SAM
control.tooltip: Generate a SAM for each simulation year and store in GDX output file.

control.title: Output all symbols
control.tooltip: Unload all sets, parameters, variables to GDX output file.

control.title: Output for EXCEL I/O similar to frEnd
Additional output file
control.tooltip: Run additional file after all years have been solve.

control.title: Symbol list
control.tooltip: Let GAMS generate a list of symbols declared and/or defined (sets, parameters, variables, equations etc.)

control.title: Symbol cross references
control.tooltip: Let GAMS generate a list of where symbols are declared, defind or used.

control.title: Profile
control.tooltip:
Let GAMS generate information on computing time need for individual statements.
Number decides on the depth of program structures such as loop and if structures to consider.

control.title: ProfileTol
control.tooltip: Minimum computing in second to report computing time for individual statements.

control.title: Start point
control.tooltip: Larger shocks might perform better when starting from updated t-1 instead of using baseline results

control.title: Default initialization
control.tooltip:
Additional GAMS code which tries to define recursively a starting point for variables from the start point (baseline, updated t-1 results) and the shock.
Often is too computing time conuming to pay off, but might help in case of numerical problems

control.title: Initialize factor demands
control.tooltip: Update factor demands based on updated factor prices.

control.title: Solve algorithm
control.tooltip:
Recommended option is to CNS. Use MCP when equalities should be turned into inequalities if variables hit bounds.
DNLP will let CONOPT4 use an algorithm which is usally slower than CNS, but less prone to stuggle with numerical problems.
The code will automatically use DNLP after the first CNS solve failed. Selecting DNLP will use it already for the first solve.

control.title: MCP Solver
control.tooltip: NLPEC will use CONOPT4 after the a MCP version of the model was contructed

control.title: QCP Solver
control.tasks: Prepare GTAP SAM,Match to macro SAM
control.tooltip: Solver to use for SAM balancing problems. CPLEX is usually faster compared to CONOPT4

control.title: Paired
control.tooltip:
Uses a version of the model where equations and variables are paired.
Using the paired version with changes of closures rules in the shock file will require redirections (addititional model statements)
The paired version is useful to find errors in case shocks suddenly results in a model where the number of variables and equations are not longer equal.

control.title: Scale model
control.tooltip:
Scales equations by the min(1.E-3, variable value in t-1). Usually improves
numerical stability but can slow down especially PATH

control.title: Automated scaling of SAM
control.tooltip:
Scales SAM such that GDP is equal to a given number. Can improve numerical stability
but implies that values shown in equation listings are scaled relative to the original SAM.

control.title: Iterlim
control.tooltip: Maximum number of iterations allowed for one solve by solver.

control.title: Reslim
control.tooltip: Maximum number of seconds allowed for one solve by solver.

control.title: Reslim first solve CNS
control.tooltip: Maximum number of seconds allowed for first solve by solver in CNS mode.

control.title: Maximum of repeated solves
control.tooltip: For MCP, repeated solve will try different option file. For CNS, restarts will switch to DNLP.

control.title: Solprint
control.options: On "Full equations and variable listing",Off "Only summary",Silent "No output at all"

control.title: Limrow
control.tooltip: Shows for each equation the Jacobian entries and the LHS

control.title: Limcol
control.tooltip: Shows for each variables the Jacobian entries, bounds and starting value

workstep.name: Build data base
workstep.tasks: Load GTAP data,Prepare GTAP SAM,Match to macro SAM
